name: canSetChannelAcc
title: canSetChannelAcc
syntax: long canSetChannelAcc(long channel, dword code, dword mask);
description: Via an acceptance filter the CAN controllers control which received messages are sent through to CANoe.Some controller chips, such as the SJA 1000, expect partitioning into acceptance mask and acceptance code.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
